Class GasTower

java.lang.Object
tower.Tower
tower.AOETower
tower.GasTower
All Implemented Interfaces:
Mergeable
public class GasTower extends AOETower implements Mergeable
Represents a specific implementation of an AOETower that utilizes toxic gas to damage enemies. * The GasTower focuses on short-range, area-of-effect damage. Additionally, it implements the Mergeable interface, allowing it to act as a base component for advanced tower fusions when combined with other elemental towers.

  • Constructor Details

    • GasTower

      public GasTower(double x, double y)
      Constructs a GasTower with predefined stats: - Range: 75 units - Cooldown: 1.5 seconds - Damage: 10 per tick
      Parameters:
      x - Horizontal position on the map.
      y - Vertical position on the map.

  • Method Details

    • getFusionResult

      public Tower getFusionResult(Tower other)
      Determines the resulting advanced tower when this GasTower is merged with another tower. * The fusion logic follows these elemental combinations: 1. Gas + Zap = PlasmaTower 2. Gas + Range = TornadoTower 3. Gas + Ice = MistTower
      Specified by:
      getFusionResult in interface Mergeable
      Parameters:
      other - The tower being merged with this one.
      Returns:
      A new instance of the resulting Tower, or null if no valid fusion exists.
